title: Prepare vehicle spray painting equipment for use
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Prepare vehicle spray painting equipment for use demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for work

pcs.text: Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify hazards associated with the work, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures 1.3 Identify tools, equipment and chemicals required for repair activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify hazards associated with the work, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures 1.3 Identify tools, equipment and chemicals required for repair activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify hazards associated with the work, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures 1.3 Identify tools, equipment and chemicals required for repair activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for work

elements.title: Set up spray painting equipment ready for use

pcs.text: Set up, test and maintain spray guns according to workplace and manufacturer procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Set up paint mixing system and paint agitators and establish serviceability according to manufacturer specifications2.3 Set up paint drying systems and inspect for correct operation according to workplace procedures2.4 Check pressure regulators and air lines according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Set up, test and maintain spray guns according to workplace and manufacturer procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Set up paint mixing system and paint agitators and establish serviceability according to manufacturer specifications2.3 Set up paint drying systems and inspect for correct operation according to workplace procedures2.4 Check pressure regulators and air lines according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Set up, test and maintain spray guns according to workplace and manufacturer procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Set up paint mixing system and paint agitators and establish serviceability according to manufacturer specifications2.3 Set up paint drying systems and inspect for correct operation according to workplace procedures2.4 Check pressure regulators and air lines according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Set up spray painting equipment ready for use

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm equipment is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
